name: Delicacy Effects
description: When you combine two tastes you never combined before, determine the effect of that combination by rolling a d12; most entries also require you to make a choice (such as a specific damage type or status effect). Once you're done, record the resulting effect on your @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.HQTDIy6suF8u6dAl]{Cookbook}: from this moment on, that combination of tastes will always produce that exact effect when you use it. Follow @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.vsXmQQBeh7FSTCc4]{Ingredients & Delicacies Rules} for more instructions.

results.description: Each of this delicacy's targets recovers from the (choose one: dazed, enraged, poisoned, shaken, slow, weak) status effect.

Each of this delicacy's targets suffers the (choose one: dazed; shaken; slow; weak) status effect.

Target Suffers: @EFFECT[dazed], @EFFECT[shaken], @EFFECT[slow], or @EFFECT[weak]

Each of this delicacy's targets recovers 40 Hit Points. This amount increases to 50 if you are level 30 or higher.

Target Recovers: @GAIN[40+(10*floor($cl/30)) hp]{Recover HP}

Each of this delicacy's targets recovers 40 Mind Points. This amount increases to 50 if you are level 30 or higher.

Target Recovers: @GAIN[40+(10*floor($cl/30)) mp]{Recover MP}

This delicacy deals 20 (choose one: air; bolt; earth; fire; ice; poison) damage to each of its targets. This amount increases to 30 damage if you are level 30 or higher.

Target Suffers: @DMG[20+(10*floor($cl/30)) air]{Air Damage}, @DMG[20+(10*floor($cl/30)) bolt]{Bolt Damage}, @DMG[20+(10*floor($cl/30)) earth]{Earth Damage}, @DMG[20+(10*floor($cl/30)) fire]{Fire Damage}, @DMG[20+(10*floor($cl/30)) ice]{Ice Damage}, or @DMG[20+(10*floor($cl/30)) poison]{Poison Damage}

Until the end of your next turn, every source that deals (choose one: air; bolt; earth; fire; ice; poison) damage deals 5 extra damage to each of this delicacy's targets.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.7Rcgd6DbIh71JmI4], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.W4k52fetZQaXPpCt], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.90WZViysiyqtAXcj], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.DrOCGuzZBaL8Vf9D], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.9KDeMz3Y73muyImH], or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.K2sUsMGhj94eTtTN]

Each of this delicacy's targets cannot perform the Guard action during their next turn.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.LzyZ6RnzdvGgeZVJ]

Each of this delicacy's targets cannot perform the Spell action during their next turn.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.OMERADe6BDUB09so]

Each of this delicacy's targets cannot perform the Skill action during their next turn.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.XsgMEJAuulzfRpPi]

Each of this delicacy's targets gains Resistance to (choose one: air; bolt; earth; fire; ice; poison) damage until the end of your next turn.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.rR9ci0QDXbRIAP2e], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.PQ4PQC1GCbo22I5j], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.BEhmZuCMOvoNkOkn], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.g9sU2CLB91YfxRBI], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.KkHm2OMClLyoV8VT], or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.gyaexWAK1a4JSyPo]

Each of this delicacy's targets treats their (choose one: Dexterity; Insight; Might; Willpower) as if it were one die size higher (up to a maximum of d12) until the end of your next turn.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.gc2VICfC8pACRBHy], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.AzPndWotlt98FDhU], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.zfbdUAZcOHuCTyi2], or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.1s3x5TtIPEbdbLM1]

During the next turn of each of this delicacy's targets, all damage they deal becomes (choose one: air; bolt; earth; fire; ice; poison) and its type cannot change.

Target Receives: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.ndASf08ny01tgBWG], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.NXCuHsCUgSgzKODy], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.pbuWkC9V2wOQ7gnx], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.N67STDVFRwyuoQpm], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.v4g2FQ8W8GtF5xxo], or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.BY4g8p6Sq8lQlQX6]
